text: "I also saw a lot of very strong, physically strong, really attractive law enforcement people come through those doors. And frankly, it made me feel very safe.” - Trump sounding kinda gay... 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

Ursula von der Leyen on Iran: It’s too early to lift sanctions. We need to see a fundamental change in Iran before any sanctions are dropped. This is about the suppression of human rights, particularly women’s rights.

The attack in Al-Sawana targeted a disabled Hezbullah fighter, from an old injury that predates this war. Even from the Syrian war. He was killed alongside his wife. Their 3 children and their grandpa were all seriously injured.

🇺🇦 The Director of the Institute of Demography and Social Research of the National Academy of Sciences of Ukraine Ella Libanova stated that no more than 30% of those who left will return to Ukraine after the war. In 2022, she predicted that number to be 50% but now, taking into account objective processes, she has lowered the forecast to 30%. According to her, people have settled abroad over the four years of war: they have found jobs, their children attend school and kindergarten, they have mastered the language and established connections. At the same time, in Ukraine something is being destroyed every day, people are losing their homes and jobs, even if they had them before. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ELINT News RT @manniefabian : IDF troops captured a cache of Hezbollah weapons in southern Lebanon, including first-person view (FPV) drones. The military says the weapons included anti-tank explosive devices and remote detonation systems, explosive-laden drones, RPGs, firearms, and other weapons. Hezbollah has made frequent use of small FPV drones in its attacks on Israeli troops in recent weeks. tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转推 @manniefabian：以色列国防军部队在黎巴嫩南部缴获了一批真主党武器，其中包括第一人称视角（FPV）无人机。军方称，这些武器包括反坦克爆炸装置、远程引爆系统、载有爆炸物的无人机、火箭筒、枪支及其他武器。近几周，真主党在针对以色列军队的袭击中频繁使用小型FPV无人机。推文

text: WarMonitor The Middle East conflict is disrupting supplies of key raw materials and driving up prices for printed circuit boards, a core component in everything from phones and computers to AI servers. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048771649533571447/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 中东冲突正在扰乱关键原材料的供应，并推高了印刷电路板的价格，这是从手机、电脑到人工智能服务器等所有设备的核心组件。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048771649533571447/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Anwar Gargash, diplomatic adviser to the UAE's President: There has always been a debate in the Gulf between the hawks and the doves. The hawks see Iran as a source of danger, and the doves believe that containing Iran is necessary because it is a neighbor. I think this debate has improved today in favor of the hawks; let's be clear about that. In 2000, we signed the Joint Defense Agreement, and we ultimately found that the GCC countries' position was correct logistically, the GCC countries supported each other, but politically and militarily, I think it was the weakest position in history. I expected such a weak stance from the Arab League, and I'm not surprised by it, but I don't expect it from the GCC, and I am surprised by it. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 阿联酋总统外交顾问安瓦尔·加尔加什：海湾地区在鹰派和鸽派之间一直存在争论。鹰派将伊朗视为危险源，而鸽派则认为遏制伊朗是必要的，因为它是邻国。我认为今天的辩论已经向有利于鹰派的方向发展；这一点必须明确。2000年，我们签署了《共同防御协议》，最终我们发现海湾合作委员会（GCC）国家的立场在后勤上是正确的，GCC国家相互支持，但在政治和军事上，我认为这是历史上最软弱的立场。我预料到阿拉伯国家联盟会采取这种软弱的立场，对此我并不感到惊讶，但我没想到GCC会这样，我对此感到惊讶。推文

text: OSINTdefender According to CNN, citing two sources with knowledge on the matter, U.S. President Donald J. Trump is set to meet with his National Security Team today to discuss next steps in how to move forward with the situation in the Middle East. One topic that will reportedly be discussed is whether or not the U.S. will resume combat operations against Iran. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据美国有线电视新闻网（CNN）援引两名知情人士的话称，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普定于今天会见其国家安全团队，讨论推进中东局势的后续步骤。据报道，将讨论的一个议题是美国是否会恢复针对伊朗的作战行动。推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah leader Naim Qassem in a written statement: We categorically reject direct negotiations with Israel. The Lebanese government must halt direct negotiations, and rescind its decision criminalizing our military wing. We do not recognize these direct negotiations or their outcomes. We will continue our resistance and will not return to the pre–March 2 situation. We will not abandon our weapons and the Israeli enemy will not remain on a single inch of our occupied land, and our people will return to their lands to the very last inch. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 真主党领导人纳伊姆·卡西姆在书面声明中表示：我们断然拒绝与以色列进行直接谈判。黎巴嫩政府必须停止直接谈判，并撤销其将我们军事派别定为犯罪的决定。我们不承认这些直接谈判及其结果。我们将继续抵抗，不会回到3月2日之前的状态。我们不会放弃武器，以色列敌人不会留在我们被占领土的一寸土地上，我们的人民将回到他们的土地，直到最后一英寸。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇷🇺 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said during a meeting with Russian President Putin that Iran‑Russia relations are a strategic partnership and will continue with the same strength, and perhaps even more broadly and powerfully than before. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 Russian President Putin told Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi that he hopes Iran will overcome its current challenges under the leadership of the new Supreme Leader. “We see that the Iranian people are bravely defending their independence and sovereignty,” Putin said. @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇷🇺 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi told President Putin that “the whole world has witnessed Iran’s real power in confronting the United States, and it has become clear that the Islamic Republic of Iran is a stable, strong and powerful system.”…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said during a meeting with Russian President Putin that Iran‑Russia relations are a strategic partnership and will continue with the same strength, and perhaps even more broadly and powerfully than before. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇷🇺 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐告诉普京总统，‘全世界都见证了伊朗在对抗美国时的真正力量，事实已经清楚，伊朗伊斯兰共和国是一个稳定、强大且有力的体系。’……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐在与俄罗斯总统普京会晤时表示，伊俄关系是战略伙伴关系，并将以同样的力度继续下去，甚至可能比以前更广泛、更强大。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇷🇺 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi thanked Russian President Putin for his condolences on the death of Iran’s late Supreme Leader and for his congratulations on the election of the new Supreme Leader, during a meeting in St. Petersburg. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi told President Putin that “the whole world has witnessed Iran’s real power in confronting the United States, and it has become clear that the Islamic Republic of Iran is a stable, strong and powerful system.” He added that the recent war proved Iran has great friends and allies like Russia, and thanked Moscow for its support. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇷🇺 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐在圣彼得堡会晤期间，感谢俄罗斯总统普京对伊朗已故最高领袖逝世表示哀悼，并对其新任最高领袖的当选表示祝贺。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐告诉普京总统，“全世界都见证了伊朗在对抗美国时的真正力量，事实已经证明，伊朗伊斯兰共和国是一个稳定、强大且有力的体系。”他补充说，最近的战争证明伊朗拥有像俄罗斯这样伟大的朋友和盟友，并感谢莫斯科的支持。@wfwitness

text: WarMonitor Reuters reports a wider-than-known Trump administration effort to assert federal DHS control over elections in at least eight states, using investigations, raids, and demands for access to voting systems and private voter data. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048764105373487439/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel NEW: Iran has proposed reopening the Strait of Hormuz to the U.S., but only after the war ends with guarantees it won’t resume. Nuclear and maritime talks would follow later. The White House is reviewing the offer ahead of Trump’s national security meeting. Iran is pushing to end the conflict before any nuclear negotiations, amid reported internal divisions in Tehran. Trump officials say he “holds the cards” and will only accept a deal that prevents Iran from getting a nuclear weapon. - Axios tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel） 最新消息：伊朗已提议向美国重新开放霍尔木兹海峡，但前提是战争结束并获得不会重启战争的保证。核问题和海事谈判将在之后进行。白宫正在特朗普的国家安全会议前审查该提议。据报道，在德黑兰内部存在分歧的情况下，伊朗正推动在任何核谈判之前结束冲突。特朗普的官员表示，他“掌握主动权”，只会接受能阻止伊朗获得核武器的协议。 - Axios 推文

text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 伊朗外长阿拉格希与普京在莫斯科握手并举行会晤。 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048758011309486340/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇷🇺 Vladimir Putin stated: 🗣️ “Excessive barriers hinder development; all of this is temporary and passing, while Russia is eternal.” https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2048757713610371205/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇷🇺 弗拉基米尔·普京表示：🗣️ “过度的障碍阻碍了发展；这一切都是暂时的、过眼云烟，而俄罗斯是永恒的。” https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2048757713610371205/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Earlier today, Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi met with Russian President Vladimir Putin on increasing coordination between the two countries, as both nations have now supplied each other with drones, most notably Shahed-pattern drones, and intelligence in their respective wars in Europe and the Middle East. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 今天早些时候，伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希会见了俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京，讨论加强两国间的协调。目前两国在各自于欧洲和中东的战争中，已经互相提供了无人机（最著名的是见证者系列无人机）和情报。推文

text: 📹 Scenes from the rescue operation of a woman from under the rubble in the aftermath of the airstrike on the town of Al-Sawana In this Israeli attack, two civilians were killed. A man and a woman
text_zh: 📹 阿尔萨瓦纳镇遭空袭后，从废墟中营救一名妇女的现场画面。在这次以色列的袭击中，两名平民丧生。一名男子和一名妇女。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and Iranian Ambassador to Moscow Kazem Jalali met with Russian President Vladimir Putin and Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐与伊朗驻莫斯科大使卡泽姆·贾拉利会见了俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京和俄罗斯外交部长谢尔盖·拉夫罗夫。 @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 Russia will do its best to help bring peace to the Middle East , Vladimir Putin said. The Russian head of state praised the Iranian people for the courageous and heroic fight for their sovereignty, saying hopefully they will live through the trying period and there will be peace. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 弗拉基米尔·普京表示，俄罗斯将尽最大努力帮助中东实现和平。这位俄罗斯国家元首称赞伊朗人民为捍卫主权所进行的勇敢而英勇的斗争，并表示希望他们能度过这段艰难时期，迎来和平。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah says in response to Israeli ceasefire violations and the demolition of homes in southern Lebanon, they targeted an Israeli D9 military bulldozer with an FPV drone in Bint Jbeil at 13:30 local time while it was demolishing houses. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党表示，为回应以色列违反停火协议及在黎巴嫩南部拆毁房屋的行为，他们在当地时间13:30于宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）使用FPV无人机袭击了一辆正在拆除房屋的以色列D9军用推土机。 @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 Warm greetings between the delegations 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 代表团之间亲切的问候 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Canadian PM Mark Carney: The U.S. has changed—that’s their right, and we are responding; that is our imperative.
text_zh: 加拿大总理马克·卡尼：美国已经变了——这是他们的权利，我们正在做出回应；这是我们的当务之急。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 ☀️ 🇮🇷 The Sordash camp housing the Komala Party in the Sulaymaniyah border area has been targeted in a Iranian attack. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 ☀️ 🇮🇷 位于苏莱曼尼亚边境地区、安置科马拉党（Komala Party）的索尔达什（Sordash）营地遭到伊朗袭击。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "Putin: The people of Iran are courageously and heroically fighting for their sovereignty." Putin: Russia will do everything that serves the interests of Iran and the region to achieve peace as soon as possible.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“普京：伊朗人民正在为捍卫主权而勇敢、英勇地战斗。”普京：俄罗斯将尽一切努力，服务于伊朗和地区的利益，以尽快实现和平。

text: UAE President MbZ’s Advisor Anwar Gargash: Iran is acting like a superpower, even without nuclear weapons. Imagine if it had them. Source: The National
text_zh: 阿联酋总统穆罕默德·本·扎耶德的顾问安瓦尔·加尔加什：伊朗的表现就像一个超级大国，即使没有核武器也是如此。想象一下如果它拥有核武器会怎样。来源：国家报（The National）

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Another Israeli airstrike on the town of Zawtar Al Sharqiyeh. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli jets carried out an airstrike targeting the town of Al-Ghandouriya in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 以色列再次对扎塔尔·沙尔基耶（Zawtar Al Sharqiyeh）镇进行空袭。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列战机对黎巴嫩南部的甘杜里耶（Al-Ghandouriya）镇进行了空袭。 @wfwitness

text: WarMonitor Trump officials are pointing to a drop in food stamp use as a sign of economic progress, but the decline has largely been driven by its policy changes and funding cuts that have since shrunk the SNAP program. (NYT) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048756553067442539/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 特朗普政府官员指出食品券使用量的下降是经济进步的标志，但这种下降在很大程度上是由其政策变化和资金削减所驱动的，这些变化已经缩减了SNAP计划。（纽约时报） https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048756553067442539/photo/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) A 5-min footage showing fighters from the Russian "Africa Corps" armed organization and Mali's government troops defending the perimeter of the Modibo Keita International Airport in the capital of Mali, Bamoko, from FLA/JNIM militants during their ongoing offensive. The Russians can be seen employing heavier vehicles, such as BTR-82A APC and BMP-3 IFV, with aerial support provided by a Mil Mi-24 helicopter. In contrast to the city of Kidal in northern Mali, which was captured by the Tuareg rebels, Russian/Malian forces were able to hold the airport. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）一段5分钟的视频显示，俄罗斯“非洲军团”武装组织的战士和马里政府军在马里首都巴马科的莫迪博·凯塔国际机场周边进行防御，抵御FLA/JNIM武装分子正在进行的进攻。可以看到俄罗斯人使用了重型车辆，如BTR-82A装甲运兵车和BMP-3步兵战车，并由米-24直升机提供空中支援。与被图阿雷格叛军占领的马里北部基达尔市不同，俄罗斯/马里联军成功守住了机场。推文

text: Open Source Intel Vladimir Putin: The Iranian people are fighting bravely and heroically for their sovereignty We hope that the Iranian people will overcome this ordeal and that peace will prevail. I conveyed through Mr. Araghchi my best wishes of safety to Leader Khamenei Russia will do everything it can to benefit Iran Iran and Russia intend to continue their strategic relations tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 弗拉基米尔·普京：伊朗人民正在为捍卫主权而勇敢、英勇地战斗。我们希望伊朗人民能够克服这一磨难，和平将会降临。我通过阿拉格齐先生向哈梅内伊领袖转达了我最美好的安全祝愿。俄罗斯将尽其所能造福伊朗。伊朗和俄罗斯打算继续保持其战略关系。推文
